summary: Test suite for Service with 13 test cases covering single-message and queue summarization
side_effects: runs service methods with mock clients
notes: Comprehensive test coverage: TestService_SummarizeMessage_Success, _ShortMessageCopiedVerbatim, _ExactThreshold (150 chars), _APIError, _StoresResult, _ShortMessageStoresResult; TestService_SummarizeUnsummarized_ProcessesQueue, _SkipsAlreadySummarized, _OnlyTodayAndYesterday, _StopsOnAPIError, _NoMessages, _ShortMessagesCounted; TestService_SummarizeUnsummarizedForChannels_NilProcessesAll, _FiltersByChannel; TestService_LocalModelPromptPreamble. Uses helper functions setupTestStore, seedSingleMessage, seedMultipleMessages.
